7b79a9abfc5c: Is the Early Bird price permanent?
ae4c0a60e961: Yes. Those who join the list before launch lock in the Early Bird price forever, as long as your subscription stays active. Future price increases won't apply to you.
ebf41442b59e: Do I need to add a card now?
ae152368f35c: No. You can join the list with just your email. We'll only ask for your card when Solo or Família launch — and you'll decide whether to stay on Free or subscribe.
c2d317f484b4: Can I cancel or switch plans later?
c937aefc1c20: Anytime, right in the app. No penalty, no lock-in. If you cancel, you'll go back to Free and keep everything you've saved about your pet.
c9945955c994: What's the real difference between Solo and Família?
3bcac689f971: Solo is for one guardian managing up to 3 pets. Família is for the whole household to care together — everyone gets their own login, everyone sees the calendar, shopping list, and who did what (who gave the medication, who went for walks).
f9a3149c3ee0: Yolki Pet is a gamified microlearning app focused on pet longevity. Created by Coflint, we were born from the belief that more informed guardians create healthier and happier pets.
8c2402afccb6: How does the Yolki method work?
367131ba1e78: Daily micro-lessons of 3 minutes, validated by veterinarians, organized in learning paths. You earn Yolks (points) for completing lessons, maintaining streaks, and reaching goals.
1e3707c7fbae: Yes! Yolki Pet will have a free version with access to essential content. Premium plans with extra features will be available after launch.
f377fffcb490: Which pets does the app work for?
01474a32fb9f: At launch, we focus on dogs and cats — from puppies to seniors, purebred or mixed breed. Other pets are on our roadmap.
553d87c478a1: All content is validated by veterinarians and based on scientific evidence. No guesswork, no myths — just accessible science for everyday life.
a87fe0c2ecb3: Yolks are our reward currency. You earn them by completing lessons, maintaining streaks, and reaching milestones. Soon, you'll be able to redeem them for real benefits for you and your pet.
ed9a629af307: We're in closed alpha with a launch planned for June 2026. Sign up for the waitlist to be among the first to test it!
36c5ef51a4c7: How do I join the beta?
d4b4f2764596: Enter your name and email on our waitlist here on the page. You'll receive an invite as soon as new spots open up.
